response.reasoning: Candidate has 19 years of software engineering experience exceeding the 15-year minimum, meeting the seniority requirement. Has strong technical breadth across web, mobile, embedded systems, infrastructure, and most recently AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq. Current role explicitly mentions MCP code generators and agentic workflows, showing engagement with AI infrastructure space. However, AI expertise appears very recent (6 months at re:cinq) and focused on infrastructure tooling rather than building demonstrated AI products or platforms. Lacks the preferred Master's/PhD in AI. Shows leadership through staff roles, training, and mentorship, but resume lacks clear evidence of director-level strategic influence, customer advisory work, or strategic AI vision needed for 'AI Strategy' specialization. Technical foundation is strong but AI strategy positioning is underdeveloped for this role.
strengths: 19+ years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, real-time systems, and DevOps — demonstrates technical versatility and proven ability to learn domains quickly
Recent engagement with AI infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq shows awareness of cutting-edge AI tooling, plus demonstrated ability to learn new technology stacks rapidly

Strong staff-level leadership track record with mentorship (training workshops, code katas), infrastructure expertise (Kubernetes, CI/CD, microservices), and open-source contributions showing technical credibility
concerns: AI/ML expertise is recent (6 months) and infrastructure-focused (MCP, agents) rather than demonstrated AI products or platforms — resume lacks the 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products' the role prefers
No Master's degree or PhD in AI or related field — role lists this as preferred qualification; candidate relies on 19 years breadth rather than specialized credentials in AI/ML

Limited evidence of strategic advisory experience or director-level organizational impact — resume shows strong IC engineering but unclear if candidate has advised strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption or shaped product strategy

key_factors.factor: Recent AI infrastructure experience but shallow demonstrated AI products
19+ years seniority with strong technical breadth and IC leadership
Missing preferred AI/ML credentials (Master's/PhD) and strategic advisory track record

response.justification: Candidate meets the 15-year experience and bachelor's degree minimums with strong seniority and technical versatility. Current role at re:cinq shows recent pivot into AI-agent infrastructure. However, the role specifically calls for a principal engineer with 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI' and preferred Master's/PhD in AI. This candidate's AI experience is recent and infrastructure-focused (MCP, tooling) rather than product or strategy-focused, and lacks the specialized credentials. The resume demonstrates strong engineering craftsmanship and IC leadership but provides insufficient evidence of the strategic AI expertise, customer advisory experience, or director-level organizational impact expected for this principal-level AI strategy role. Technical foundation is solid but AI specialization positioning is underdeveloped.
